user.title: Voltiq Energy Manager
user.description: Choose your electricity retailer and optionally connect to your Voltiq backend for device control.

data.backend_url: Voltiq backend URL (optional, for device control)

supabase.title: Voltiq Cloud (optional)
supabase.description: Connect to your Voltiq Supabase database to enable earnings tracking, alerts, and settings sync. Skip if you only need energy prices and solar forecast.

location.title: Solar Forecast
location.description: Used for solar generation forecasting via Open-Meteo (free, no API key needed).

error.cannot_connect: Cannot reach backend — check the URL and try again.
